vehicle.label: Long-Range Surveillance Wing
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing flying-wing UAV, 2m wingspan, 4+ hour endurance

parts.label: Center Body Pod
parts.spec: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

parts.label: Wing Rib Set x 12
parts.spec: Wing rib NACA airfoil profile, lightening pockets, leading edge sock, trailing edge taper

parts.label: Elevon Servo Pocket x 2
parts.spec: Elevon servo pocket, MG90S or DS215MG, control horn linkage, removable access cover

parts.label: Motor + Pusher Prop Mount
parts.spec: Rear pusher 2814 BLDC mount, 10x7 folding prop clearance, thrust line +1deg down

parts.label: GPS + Pitot Boom
parts.spec: Nose boom 8mm, GPS at tip, pitot static port forward, BEC airflow shielded

parts.label: Camera Gimbal Bay
parts.spec: Forward downward camera gimbal bay 70mm deep, 2-axis micro gimbal, optical window

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide)
parts.spec: 4S 16000mAh Li-ion slide-in bay, CG adjust slot, top access hatch, balance lead window

parts.label: Integration Service Backbone
parts.spec: Wing/fuselage integration service backbone with assembly_datum pads, harness_raceway, service_hatch, connector_keying, anti-rotation wing datum, and visible load-path inspection marks

requirements.description: Provide structural support for wing spars and motor pylon.
Ensure smooth operation of the equipment bay door.
Facilitate cooling airflow from motor pod to cooling inlet.

verify.rule: Ensure all necessary sections and elements are included.

verify.value: Estimated mass is 500g, which may be too heavy for the overall design.
verify.rule: Check if the estimated mass fits within the overall vehicle mass budget.

verify.value: All required features are mapped to specific geometry operations.
verify.rule: Each requirement should map to a specific geometry operation.

verify.value: All interfaces are reciprocal with neighboring subsystems.
verify.rule: Interfaces should be clearly defined and reciprocal between subsystems.

verify.value: Some fastener patterns lack explicit locking methods and preload evidence.
verify.rule: Critical joints must include visible locking methods and preload evidence.

risk.desc: The center body pod may exceed the overall mass budget due to its current estimate of 500g.
risk.mit: Review and optimize the design to reduce weight where possible.

risk.desc: Lack of explicit locking methods and preload evidence for some fastener patterns may compromise structural integrity.
risk.mit: Add visible locking methods and preload evidence to all critical joints.

risk.desc: Potential blocked access for inspection and maintenance due to monolithic design.
risk.mit: Integrate parts only when service access remains visible and ensure clear inspection paths.

risk.desc: Risk of thermal stress due to inadequate cooling path design.
risk.mit: Enhance cooling path design to ensure efficient airflow from motor pod to cooling inlet.

risk.desc: Suboptimal manufacturing process may lead to quality issues.
risk.mit: Review and refine the manufacturing strategy to ensure compatibility with the chosen process.

manufacturing_strategy.datum: primary locating faces, rail guides, axis rings
manufacturing_strategy.tolerance: tight fit for structural integrity, loose fit for service access
manufacturing_strategy.support: oriented for minimal support structures, aligned with print bed
manufacturing_strategy.inspection: visual inspection for alignment, ultrasonic testing for delamination
